items.scenario: You recently signed up for a weekend ceramics class at the Brookfield Community Studio. The first session is scheduled for next Saturday morning, but you have not yet received any information about required supplies or whether materials are provided.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Harrington. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe which class you registered for
Ask what supplies you need to bring
Request confirmation of the start time
items.subject: Supplies and start time for Saturday ceramics class

items.scenario: You are a sophomore enrolled in a sociology methods course. You had to miss two lectures last week because of a family emergency and you are worried about the upcoming literature-review assignment due on Friday.
items.direction: Write an email to Dr. Brennan. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you missed the recent lectures
Describe which parts of the assignment seem unclear
Ask whether a short extension would be possible
items.subject: Missed lectures and literature-review assignment

items.scenario: You ordered a refurbished wireless printer from an online electronics retailer about two weeks ago. Since installation, the printer has repeatedly disconnected from your home network, and the included starter ink cartridges were already empty.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Calderon. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the connectivity problem with the printer
Tell what happened with the ink cartridges
Ask about a refund or replacement
items.subject: Defective refurbished printer from order PR-58129

items.scenario: You are a member of the Westwood Public Library and recently joined its monthly book club. The next meeting is at a new evening time that overlaps with your evening lab section, and you would like to know your options.
items.direction: Write an email to Dr. Aldridge. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the time conflict you are facing
Ask whether an earlier meeting slot is available
items.subject: Time conflict with monthly book club meeting
